The '''Magatesso system''' or the '''Shola system''' was a [[Star system/Legends|star system]] located within the [[Tammuz sector/Legends|Tammuz sector]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] region of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. It contained the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Shola/Legends|Shola]].

{{System-stub}}
